import React from 'react' import c from './mainReport.module.scss' import { Icons } from '../../assets/icons' import { API } from '../../api' const ClientsReport = () => { const [ dailyExpense, setDailyExpense ] = React.useState(null) React.useEffect(() => { API.getDailyExpenses() .then(res => setDailyExpense(res.data)) }, []) return (
